mapper.select:
SELECT P.ID, P.POST_TITLE, P.POST_CONTENT, P.POST_THUMBNAIL_URL, S.POST_CREATED_AT, S.POST_READ_COUNT, S.MEMBER_ID, S.MEMBER_NICKNAME, S.MEMBER_PROFILE_IMAGE_URL, S.CATEGORY_ID, S.LIKE_COUNT, S.IS_LIKED, S.REPLY_COUNT FROM TBL_POST P JOIN ( SELECT P.ID AS POST_ID, TO_CHAR(P.POST_CREATED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS') AS POST_CREATED_AT, P.POST_READ_COUNT, M.ID AS MEMBER_ID, M.MEMBER_NICKNAME, M.MEMBER_PROFILE_IMAGE_URL, P.CATEGORY_ID, COUNT(DISTINCT PL.ID) AS LIKE_COUNT, MAX(CASE WHEN PL.MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS IS_LIKED, COUNT(DISTINCT R.ID) AS REPLY_COUNT FROM TBL_POST P JOIN TBL_MEMBER M ON P.MEMBER_ID = M.ID JOIN TBL_CATEGORY C ON P.CATEGORY_ID = C.ID LEFT JOIN TBL_POST_LIKE PL ON P.ID = PL.POST_ID LEFT JOIN TBL_REPLY R ON P.ID = R.POST_ID WHERE P.POST_DELETED_AT IS NULL AND P.MEMBER_ID = #{memberId}
AND P.POST_TITLE LIKE '%' || #{content} || '%'
AND (P.POST_TITLE LIKE '%' || #{content} || '%' OR DBMS_LOB.INSTR(P.POST_CONTENT, #{content}) > 0)
AND DBMS_LOB.INSTR(P.POST_CONTENT, #{content}) > 0
GROUP BY P.ID, P.POST_CREATED_AT, P.POST_READ_COUNT, M.ID, M.MEMBER_NICKNAME, M.MEMBER_PROFILE_IMAGE_URL, P.CATEGORY_ID
ORDER BY P.ID DESC
OFFSET (#{page} - 1) * 6 ROWS FETCH NEXT 6 ROWS ONLY
) S ON P.ID = S.POST_ID

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_POST P JOIN TBL_MEMBER M ON P.MEMBER_ID = M.ID WHERE P.POST_DELETED_AT IS NULL AND P.MEMBER_ID = #{memberId}
AND P.POST_TITLE LIKE '%' || #{content} || '%'
AND (P.POST_TITLE LIKE '%' || #{content} || '%' OR DBMS_LOB.INSTR(P.POST_CONTENT, #{content}) > 0)
AND DBMS_LOB.INSTR(P.POST_CONTENT, #{content}) > 0

SELECT P.ID, P.POST_TITLE, P.POST_CONTENT, P.POST_THUMBNAIL_URL, S.POST_CREATED_AT, S.POST_READ_COUNT, S.MEMBER_ID, S.MEMBER_NICKNAME, S.MEMBER_PROFILE_IMAGE_URL, S.CATEGORY_ID, S.LIKE_COUNT, S.IS_LIKED, S.REPLY_COUNT FROM TBL_POST P JOIN ( SELECT P.ID AS POST_ID, TO_CHAR(P.POST_CREATED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS') AS POST_CREATED_AT, P.POST_READ_COUNT, M.ID AS MEMBER_ID, M.MEMBER_NICKNAME, M.MEMBER_PROFILE_IMAGE_URL, P.CATEGORY_ID, COUNT(DISTINCT PL.ID) AS LIKE_COUNT, MAX(CASE WHEN PL.MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS IS_LIKED, COUNT(DISTINCT R.ID) AS REPLY_COUNT FROM TBL_POST P JOIN TBL_MEMBER M ON P.MEMBER_ID = M.ID JOIN TBL_CATEGORY C ON P.CATEGORY_ID = C.ID LEFT JOIN TBL_POST_LIKE PL ON P.ID = PL.POST_ID LEFT JOIN TBL_REPLY R ON P.ID = R.POST_ID WHERE P.POST_DELETED_AT IS NULL
AND P.CATEGORY_ID = #{category}
AND P.POST_TITLE LIKE '%' || #{content} || '%'
AND (P.POST_TITLE LIKE '%' || #{content} || '%' OR DBMS_LOB.INSTR(P.POST_CONTENT, #{content}) > 0)
AND DBMS_LOB.INSTR(P.POST_CONTENT, #{content}) > 0
AND M.MEMBER_NICKNAME LIKE '%' || #{content} || '%'
AND P.ID IN ( SELECT POST_ID FROM TBL_REPLY WHERE REPLY_CONTENT LIKE '%' || #{content} || '%' )
GROUP BY P.ID, P.POST_CREATED_AT, P.POST_READ_COUNT, M.ID, M.MEMBER_NICKNAME, M.MEMBER_PROFILE_IMAGE_URL, P.CATEGORY_ID
ORDER BY LIKE_COUNT DESC
ORDER BY POST_READ_COUNT DESC
ORDER BY POST_CREATED_AT DESC
OFFSET (#{page} - 1) * 6 ROWS FETCH NEXT 6 ROWS ONLY
) S ON P.ID = S.POST_ID

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_POST P JOIN TBL_MEMBER M ON P.MEMBER_ID = M.ID WHERE P.POST_DELETED_AT IS NULL
AND P.CATEGORY_ID = #{category}
AND P.POST_TITLE LIKE '%' || #{content} || '%'
AND (P.POST_TITLE LIKE '%' || #{content} || '%' OR DBMS_LOB.INSTR(P.POST_CONTENT, #{content}) > 0)
AND DBMS_LOB.INSTR(P.POST_CONTENT, #{content}) > 0
AND M.MEMBER_NICKNAME LIKE '%' || #{content} || '%'
AND P.ID IN ( SELECT POST_ID FROM TBL_REPLY WHERE REPLY_CONTENT LIKE '%' || #{content} || '%' )

SELECT TBP.ID, TBP.POST_CONTENT, -- CLOB 서브쿼리 밖에서 조회 TBP.POST_TITLE, TO_CHAR(TBP.POST_CREATED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS') AS POST_CREATED_AT, TBP.POST_READ_COUNT, TBP.POST_THUMBNAIL_URL, TBS.MEMBER_ID, TBS.MEMBER_NICKNAME, TBS.MEMBER_PROFILE_IMAGE_URL, TBS.CATEGORY_ID, TBS.CATEGORY_NAME, TBS.LIKE_COUNT, TBS.IS_LIKED FROM TBL_POST TBP JOIN ( SELECT TBP.ID AS POST_ID, TBM.ID AS MEMBER_ID, TBM.MEMBER_NICKNAME, TBM.MEMBER_PROFILE_IMAGE_URL, TBC.ID AS CATEGORY_ID, TBC.CATEGORY_NAME, COUNT(TBPL.ID) AS LIKE_COUNT, MAX(CASE WHEN TBPL.MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS IS_LIKED FROM TBL_POST TBP JOIN TBL_MEMBER TBM ON TBP.MEMBER_ID = TBM.ID JOIN TBL_CATEGORY TBC ON TBP.CATEGORY_ID = TBC.ID LEFT JOIN TBL_POST_LIKE TBPL ON TBP.ID = TBPL.POST_ID WHERE TBP.ID = #{postId} AND TBP.POST_DELETED_AT IS NULL GROUP BY TBP.ID, TBM.ID, TBM.MEMBER_NICKNAME, TBM.MEMBER_PROFILE_IMAGE_URL, TBC.ID, TBC.CATEGORY_NAME ) TBS ON TBP.ID = TBS.POST_ID

SELECT ID, POST_TITLE, POST_CONTENT, TO_CHAR(POST_CREATED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS') AS POST_CREATED_AT, POST_READ_COUNT, MEMBER_ID, CATEGORY_ID,POST_DELETED_AT, POST_THUMBNAIL_URL FROM TBL_POST WHERE ID = #{id}

SELECT TBP.ID, TBP.POST_TITLE, TBP.POST_CONTENT, TBS.POST_CREATED_AT, TBS.POST_READ_COUNT, TBS.MEMBER_ID, TBS.MEMBER_NICKNAME, TBS.MEMBER_PROFILE_IMAGE_URL, TBS.CATEGORY_ID, TBS.LIKE_COUNT, TBS.IS_LIKED, TBS.REPLY_COUNT FROM TBL_POST TBP JOIN ( SELECT TBP.ID AS POST_ID, TO_CHAR(TBP.POST_CREATED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS') AS POST_CREATED_AT, TBP.POST_READ_COUNT, TBM.ID AS MEMBER_ID, TBM.MEMBER_NICKNAME, TBM.MEMBER_PROFILE_IMAGE_URL, TBP.CATEGORY_ID, COUNT(DISTINCT TBPL.ID) AS LIKE_COUNT, MAX(CASE WHEN TBPL.MEMBER_ID = #{id} THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS IS_LIKED, COUNT(DISTINCT TBR.ID) AS REPLY_COUNT FROM TBL_POST TBP JOIN TBL_MEMBER TBM ON TBP.MEMBER_ID = TBM.ID JOIN TBL_CATEGORY TBC ON TBP.CATEGORY_ID = TBC.ID LEFT JOIN TBL_POST_LIKE TBPL ON TBP.ID = TBPL.POST_ID LEFT JOIN TBL_REPLY TBR ON TBP.ID = TBR.POST_ID WHERE TBP.POST_DELETED_AT IS NULL -- 저번달 <= 게시글 < 이번달 AND TBP.POST_CREATED_AT >= TRUNC(ADD_MONTHS(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, -1), 'MM') AND TBP.POST_CREATED_AT < TRUNC(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'MM') GROUP BY TBP.ID, TBP.POST_CREATED_AT, TBP.POST_READ_COUNT, TBM.ID, TBM.MEMBER_NICKNAME, TBM.MEMBER_PROFILE_IMAGE_URL, TBP.CATEGORY_ID ORDER BY LIKE_COUNT DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY ) TBS ON TBP.ID = TBS.POST_ID

SELECT TBP.ID, TBP.POST_TITLE, TBP.POST_CONTENT, TBS.POST_CREATED_AT, TBS.POST_READ_COUNT, TBS.MEMBER_ID, TBS.MEMBER_NICKNAME, TBS.MEMBER_PROFILE_IMAGE_URL, TBS.CATEGORY_ID, TBS.LIKE_COUNT, TBS.IS_LIKED, TBS.REPLY_COUNT FROM TBL_POST TBP JOIN ( SELECT TBP.ID AS POST_ID, TO_CHAR(TBP.POST_CREATED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS') AS POST_CREATED_AT, TBP.POST_READ_COUNT, TBM.ID AS MEMBER_ID, TBM.MEMBER_NICKNAME, TBM.MEMBER_PROFILE_IMAGE_URL, TBP.CATEGORY_ID, COUNT(DISTINCT TBPL.ID) AS LIKE_COUNT, MAX(CASE WHEN TBPL.MEMBER_ID = #{id} THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS IS_LIKED, COUNT(DISTINCT TBR.ID) AS REPLY_COUNT FROM TBL_POST TBP JOIN TBL_MEMBER TBM ON TBP.MEMBER_ID = TBM.ID JOIN TBL_CATEGORY TBC ON TBP.CATEGORY_ID = TBC.ID LEFT JOIN TBL_POST_LIKE TBPL ON TBP.ID = TBPL.POST_ID LEFT JOIN TBL_REPLY TBR ON TBP.ID = TBR.POST_ID WHERE TBP.POST_DELETED_AT IS NULL AND TBP.POST_CREATED_AT >= ADD_MONTHS(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, -1) GROUP BY TBP.ID, TBP.POST_CREATED_AT, TBP.POST_READ_COUNT, TBM.ID, TBM.MEMBER_NICKNAME, TBM.MEMBER_PROFILE_IMAGE_URL, TBP.CATEGORY_ID ORDER BY LIKE_COUNT DESC OFFSET 0 ROWS FETCH NEXT 10 ROWS ONLY ) TBS ON TBP.ID = TBS.POST_ID
SELECT ID, POST_TITLE FROM TBL_POST WHERE ID = ( SELECT MAX(ID) FROM TBL_POST WHERE ID < #{id} AND POST_DELETED_AT IS NULL )
SELECT ID, POST_TITLE FROM TBL_POST WHERE ID = ( SELECT MIN(ID) FROM TBL_POST WHERE ID > #{id} AND POST_DELETED_AT IS NULL )
SELECT COUNT(*) AS POST_COUNT FROM TBL_POST WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{id}
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_POST.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO TBL_POST(ID, POST_TITLE, POST_CONTENT, MEMBER_ID, CATEGORY_ID, POST_THUMBNAIL_URL) VALUES (#{id}, #{postTitle}, #{postContent}, #{memberId}, #{categoryId}, #{postThumbnailUrl})
mapper.select: SELECT ID, POST_CONTENT FROM TBL_POST WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{id} ORDER BY ID DESC FETCH FIRST ROWS ONLY
SELECT ID, POST_CONTENT FROM TBL_POST WHERE ID = #{id}

SELECT TBP.ID, TBP.POST_TITLE, TBP.POST_CONTENT, TBS.POST_CREATED_AT, TBS.POST_READ_COUNT, TBS.MEMBER_ID, TBS.MEMBER_NICKNAME, TBS.MEMBER_PROFILE_IMAGE_URL, TBS.CATEGORY_ID, TBS.LIKE_COUNT, TBS.IS_LIKED, TBS.REPLY_COUNT FROM TBL_POST TBP JOIN ( SELECT TBP.ID AS POST_ID, TO_CHAR(TBP.POST_CREATED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS') AS POST_CREATED_AT, TBP.POST_READ_COUNT, TBM.ID AS MEMBER_ID, TBM.MEMBER_NICKNAME, TBM.MEMBER_PROFILE_IMAGE_URL, TBP.CATEGORY_ID, COUNT(DISTINCT TBPL.ID) AS LIKE_COUNT, MAX(CASE WHEN TBPL.MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS IS_LIKED, COUNT(DISTINCT TBR.ID) AS REPLY_COUNT FROM TBL_POST TBP JOIN TBL_MEMBER TBM ON TBP.MEMBER_ID = TBM.ID JOIN TBL_CATEGORY TBC ON TBP.CATEGORY_ID = TBC.ID LEFT JOIN TBL_POST_LIKE TBPL ON TBP.ID = TBPL.POST_ID LEFT JOIN TBL_REPLY TBR ON TBP.ID = TBR.POST_ID WHERE TBP.POST_DELETED_AT IS NULL AND TBP.ID = #{id} GROUP BY TBP.ID, TBP.POST_CREATED_AT, TBP.POST_READ_COUNT, TBM.ID, TBM.MEMBER_NICKNAME, TBM.MEMBER_PROFILE_IMAGE_URL, TBP.CATEGORY_ID ) TBS ON TBP.ID = TBS.POST_ID
SELECT ID, POST_CONTENT FROM TBL_POST WHERE POST_THUMBNAIL_URL IS NULL AND POST_DELETED_AT IS NULL AND POST_CONTENT IS NOT NULL
